overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk from the desert outskirts into the dense urban environment of Night City. The player transitions from arid wasteland to city sidewalks, crosses a multi-lane road with moderate traffic, and continues toward the downtown skyline with towering holographic advertisements.

events.description: screen fades to black transitioning from desert wasteland to urban environment

agents.ego_description: walking through arid desert outskirts past abandoned buildings and billboards

entered.detail: dilapidated two-story house with satellite dishes on the roof
tall red advertising billboard with digital screen
dry bushes and desert vegetation scattered across sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit desert wasteland with sparse vegetation. An abandoned house with satellite dishes sits in the distance, while a tall digital billboard stands to the left. The camera walks forward along a dirt path before the screen fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with palm trees and holographic advertisements

events.description: emerges from darkness into bright city street with towering holographic ads
pedestrians pass by closely on the sidewalk, requiring slight navigation

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk passing other pedestrians with the downtown skyline ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants and white shirt walking toward camera
pedestrian in brown jacket walking away from camera down sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk
massive holographic advertisements projecting vertically into the sky above downtown
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with glass and steel facades
paved pedestrian walkway with red painted curb

segments.scene_description: Emerging from darkness into a bright cyberpunk cityscape, the camera walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees. Towering holographic advertisements rise above the downtown skyline in the distance. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including one in red pants passing closely on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane road intersection with vehicle traffic

events.description: steps off sidewalk onto the asphalt road surface to cross
teal sports car and silver sedan drive past while crossing the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane road while navigating around passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the road passing the crossing point
orange jeep with large tires driving past on the road

entered.detail: multi-lane road with yellow dividing lines and patches
stacks of black vehicle tires piled on the roadside
low concrete wall separating the road from the opposite sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera steps off the sidewalk onto the asphalt road to cross the intersection. Vehicles including a silver sedan and an orange jeep drive past while the crossing continues. Piles of tires sit on the left roadside, and a concrete barrier appears on the right as the camera moves toward the opposite curb.

events.description: steps back onto sidewalk on the opposite side of the road
view opens up to reveal dense downtown cityscape with flying vehicles overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the elevated sidewalk toward the dense city center with increasing pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk toward downtown

entered.detail: concrete wall painted with bright geometric murals and colorful patterns
metal framework structures supporting elevated walkways or buildings
concentrated cluster of high-rise buildings with industrial and modern architecture

segments.scene_description: Back on the sidewalk, the camera continues walking along an elevated pathway with a concrete barrier now on the left. A colorful graffiti-covered wall and industrial scaffolding line the left side. The view opens up to reveal the dense downtown cityscape ahead, with holographic towers visible above the skyline and pedestrians walking in the same direction toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a desolate, sunlit wasteland into the dense, neon-lit urban sprawl of a cyberpunk city. It begins on a dirt path in a sparse desert, passing a digital billboard and an abandoned house with satellite dishes before a momentary fade to black. As the camera emerges from the darkness, the environment shifts abruptly to a bright cityscape where the camera walks along a palm-lined concrete sidewalk past pedestrians and towering holographic advertisements. The movement then carries the viewer off the curb and across a busy asphalt intersection, weaving between a silver sedan and an orange jeep while passing piles of tires and concrete barriers. Finally, the camera returns to an elevated pathway lined with graffiti-covered walls and industrial scaffolding, moving forward as the view opens up to reveal the massive holographic towers of the downtown skyline.
